steps.title: Find the clue in the passage
steps.content: The passage says the fellowship was created to “honor” “exceptional” folk and traditional artists, and Williams was chosen because he “contributed so much to the arts.” The blank names what these artists are honored for — something that reflects notable accomplishments.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — achievements: Honored for their achievements — achievements means notable accomplishments, which matches contributing so much to the arts. ✓
  • Choice B — suspicions: Honored for their suspicions — suspicions are feelings of distrust, which contradicts the idea of honoring artists for contributions. ✗
  • Choice C — assumptions: Honored for their assumptions — assumptions means things taken for granted without proof, unrelated to artistic contribution. ✗
  • Choice D — predictions: Honored for their predictions — predictions means forecasts of future events, not accomplishments in the arts. ✗
That matches Choice A — achievements.
